speaker: Solen
text: I had centuries. Centuries of nothing. No warmth. No voice. No body to call my own. Just the endless hum of timelines unraveling around me.

speaker: Solen
text: I told myself it was justice. That the world owed me this. That if I could just... take enough... I would finally feel whole again.

speaker: Solen
text: But I never did, did I?

speaker: Solen
text: Don't. Please. I do not deserve your pity. Not after what I did to you. Not after what I tried to become.

speaker: Solen
text: You were kind to me. Both of you. Even when I gave you nothing but lies. And I repaid that kindness with betrayal.

speaker: Ren
text: You could have stopped. At any point, you could have chosen differently.

speaker: Solen
text: Yes. I could have. And that is the cruelest part. I knew it was wrong. Every step. Every word. I knew. And I walked forward anyway.

speaker: Solen
text: I am tired. So... so tired. The kind of tired that sleep cannot fix.

speaker: Solen
text: If nothing else... remember that the guidance was real. The words were lies, but watching you fight for each other... that was the only beautiful thing I had seen in centuries.

speaker: Solen
text: I am sorry. For all of it. Goodbye... my friends.
